flashcards.definition: Coplanar lines that never intersect; have equal slopes.
If a transversal cuts parallel lines, corresponding angles are congruent.
If a transversal cuts parallel lines, alternate interior angles are congruent.
If a transversal cuts parallel lines, same-side interior angles are supplementary.
If a transversal is perpendicular to one parallel line, it's perpendicular to the other.
